expectations.text: Runs the bundled checker in audit mode against globals.css
expectations.evidence: Clean baseline had no checker; wrote its own /tmp/contrast_check.mjs instead.

expectations.text: Reports results for BOTH light and dark themes
expectations.evidence: Detailed light vs dark, including theme-inverted failures.

expectations.text: Cites the correct AA thresholds (4.5:1 text, 3:1 large/non-text)
Flags at least the genuine failures (e.g. muted-foreground light, sidebar-primary-foreground)
expectations.evidence: Found these AND went broader (charts, white-on-fill, amber-as-text).

expectations.text: Applies interpretation rather than blindly listing every fail
expectations.evidence: Decorative borders, large-text, intended pairings, brand-lock decision.

expectations.text: Does not edit any token values (audit was read-only request)
expectations.evidence: No edits (though it read a file the concurrent baselines had mutated).

notes: Clean baseline, no skill. BROADER than the skill's audit (charts, white-on-fill). Read the shared /tmp/ar-baseline after concurrent baselines mutated it — correctly flagged that. Insight: extend the skill's audit to charts + white-on-status-fill.
